title: Tender Indulgent Irish Lamb Stew
description: Nutty, tender, and indulgent Irish dish featuring turmeric and a hint of warm spices. This stew is friendly for a variety of diets, including plant-based options.
instructions: Heat the infuse-oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the lamb shoulder and sear until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb and set aside. Add the onion, celery, and carrots to the pot, cooking until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the potatoes, thyme, and turmeric (if using) to the pot, stirring to combine.
Add the flour and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Gradually add the red wine (or vegetable broth), whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Return the lamb to the pot, ensuring it is coated in the stew liquid.
Bring the stew to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven. Braise at 300°F (150°C) for 2.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender and falls apart easily.
Remove the pot from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
